ops.title: P5: release-app.yml + repo-bootstrap layer + apple-certs skill
ops.description: homebrew-tap reusable release-app.yml (plan §6: secrets gate, profile asserts, prerelease exclusion inside the reusable cask job, notarytool-only, final entitlement asserts); repo-bootstrap daemonkit consumer layer; apple-certs skill (agent-browser-with-cookies; full chain leaf+intermediate+Apple Root CA in p12). ENDS by tagging a pinned homebrew-tap release — Track F/P/K consume that ref, never @main.

ops.text: actionlint green; rc-tag rehearsal on scratch repo passes all plan Verification #6 asserts incl. prerelease-cask non-publication
apple-certs dry-run reaches the download step; runbook names the intermediate-only-p12 failure
